arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes drops huge Ruud van Nistelrooy hint on eve of Ruben Amorim's Man Utd arrival
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy earned a third win in four matches as Manchester United's interim manager but his future remains up in the air with Ruben Amorim to join as head coach

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk opens up on Arne Slot change which has made Liverpool title frontrunners
arts.sum: Liverpool went five points clear at the top of the Premier League with a win over Aston Villa on Saturday. with the Reds having been given little chance of winning the title at the start of the season

arts.ttl: Man Utd see off Leicester in Ruud van Nistelrooy’s final game as interim manager
arts.sum: New United head coach Ruben Amorim is taking over from the caretaker boss.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy did something Man United fans may have missed in 3-0 farewell win over Leicester - opinion
Man Utd 3-0 Leicester: Player ratings as Van Nistelrooy bows out with routine victory
arts.sum: Player ratings and match reaction from Man Utd's Premier League clash with Leicester on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk feels Liverpool are better for last season’s title race drop-off
arts.sum: The Reds capitalised on Manchester City’s defeat at Brighton with a 2-0 win over Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Man United 3-0 Leicester: Ruud van Nistelrooy bows out on a high as Bruno Fernandes and Alejandro Garnacho score either side of an own goal in final game before Ruben Amorim's arrival
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AT OLD TRAFFORD: Over to you, Ruben. Ruud van Nistelrooy ended an unbeaten four-match stint as United's interim manager with another win over Leicester.

arts.ttl: Follow live: Man United host Leicester in Van Nistelrooy's last game in charge
arts.sum: Manchester United host Leicester City as interim head coach Ruud van Nistelrooy oversees his last game in charge at Old Trafford before Rúben Amorim takes over

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy reveals true feelings on Ruben Amorim in final Man Utd programme notes
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy's future is in question with Ruben Amorim's arrival as manager coming on Monday, leaving the Dutchman, who rejoined the club as assistant manager in the summer, to wait and see

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy names the major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim as Man Utd manager before he starts work at Old Trafford.
